query: In a Vue chat UI, render an LLM tool call (getWeather) including its loading and result states using the AI SDK v5.
expected_behavior: Branches a tool part on part.state (input-available / output-available / output-error)
Reads part.output only in the output-available state
Uses the tool-<name> part type (e.g. tool-getWeather) or dynamic-tool
